evals.name: basic-config-setup
evals.prompt: I need to set up checksy for my Node.js project. What should my .checksy.yaml look like?
evals.expected_output: A valid .checksy.yaml with preconditions for node_modules and rules for tests, linting, and type checking
assertions: Output contains valid YAML with 'rules' array
Includes at least one precondition for dependencies
Examples are relevant to Node.js projects

evals.name: git-cache-error-fix
evals.prompt: My checksy check is failing with 'git remote not cached' error. How do I fix this?
evals.expected_output: Clear instructions to run 'checksy install' or use --fix flag

evals.name: github-actions-integration
evals.prompt: How do I integrate checksy into my GitHub Actions workflow?
evals.expected_output: Complete GitHub Actions YAML with checksy installation and execution
assertions: Provides valid GitHub Actions workflow syntax

evals.name: fix-mode-usage
evals.prompt: I have a failing check that says 'npm test' failed. Can I make it auto-fix?
evals.expected_output: Instructions on adding 'fix' property with appropriate npm command
assertions: Shows example fix command for npm
Mentions that fix runs before re-checking

evals.name: remote-config-setup
evals.prompt: I want to share checksy configs across my team's repos. What's the best approach?
evals.expected_output: Explanation of git-based remote configs with proper URL format

evals.name: severity-filtering
evals.prompt: How do I run only warning and error checks but make the command fail only on errors?
assertions: Shows example command with both flags

evals.name: implicit-trigger-health-checks
evals.prompt: I need to set up health checks for my development workspace. What tool should I use?
evals.expected_output: Recommendation to use checksy with explanation of how it works
